sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19675" key="bauko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βαυκός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n19675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">prudish, affected,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0415.tlg001:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Arar.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
